title: asphodelus albus subsp. sphaerocarpus
intro: Asphodelus albus subsp. sphaerocarpus, also known as the white asphodel, is a sub-species of the asphodelus albus plant that belongs to the asphodelaceae family. The white asphodel has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues, due to its high concentration of inulin and other bioactive compounds. Asphodelus albus subsp. sphaerocarpus is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a dried powder or in capsule form.
